feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: A Little Sunshine
entry.summary:
Author: LuminescentWoollyBear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,193Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 11

Summary: An alien appears in Metropolis and Bruce doesn't know what to do about it. Even more concerning, Bruce breaks his promise to himself to avoid unnecessary attachments and starts developing feelings for his new friend, Clark. But he just can't help gravitating towards the earnest kindness and protective warmth of the other. If he isn't careful, Bruce might even start trusting him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

  • Bruce Wayne/Other(s)

entry.title: L’appel Du Vide
entry.summary:
Author: NyxieSpades27

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,120Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 8

Summary: L'appel Due Vide Human instincts can't always be trusted.We can be on the highest of grounds, our steps measured, our breath cutting short in fear. And as you look down, you can either embrace fear like a safe blanket, forbidding you to do anything illogical. Or you could succumb to the endless urge of letting go, accepting the dark pit below like one final hug —cold and painful— from death's welcoming arms.   The Justice League: The Greatest Heroes of the World, bring hope in salvation and faith of another waking day to the common civilians. But where does it come from? That...motivation to keep going? That small voice in their head which...they aren't able to recognize, yet sounds oh-so-familiar? Were they Dreams?Fantasies?Hallucinations? Or something as terrifying as memories?   — Also known as a story about a different timeline where our heroes' legacies and sidekicks were taken in by the wrong people at the perfect time.

entry.title: Do I Wanna Know?
entry.summary:
Author: Deluv_011

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,876Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 438

Summary: Damian Wayne and Conner Kent form an unexpected couple. However, few knew that behind that façade, each of them had their heart burning for someone else. Thus, Damian and Conner cling to each other as a distorted reflection of what they truly long for. Damian yearns for Jon Kent. Conner pines for Tim Drake. And the deeper they fall into that strange relationship, the more they begin to notice certain glances among their teammates… glances that reveal far more than mere friendship.

entry.title: How Long Has This Been Going On?
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,971Chapters: 3/10Kudos: 46

Summary: “On the roof. I know what it was,” The boy said. “What was it? What did you see?” Clark said, glancing around. “It was Death I think?” He replied. “Death? What does that mean?” “Death was watching,” John began matter of factly, raising a hand to point behind Clark, “Death was watching and he was looking at you.” Quickly, Clark whipped his head to look in the direction John was pointing. He turned just quickly enough to see a wisp of black disappear behind a building. OR Batman stalks the hell out of Superman. Bruce Wayne is intrigued by Clark Kent. Superman is horrified by Batman. Bumbling reporter Clark Kent can’t seem to figure Bruce Wayne out. Identity mishaps occur. Idea from @lescrenti ‘s TikTok!New chapter every other day

entry.title: Nothing beats a Jet Two Holiday. And right now, you can save 50 pounds per person, that's 200 pounds off for a family of four.
entry.summary:
Author: rosered27

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,745Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 232

Summary: "Please, Timmy.” Pulling him into his arms again, Tim didn’t protest it at all. “Just give us a chance to show you that we do, ‘kay? Please?” Tim sunk into Dick's hug. Sad, hurting, a part of him upset with his parents, and very hesitant. “...I dunno if I can.” “Then promise you’ll try? Can you do that?” “....Okay.” He whispered, breath stuttering. “...I’ll try.” or; Tim hasn't had anyone to rely on, and he'd never planned on that being the case... Maybe he should give it a try? (!!! THIS IS PART OF A SERIES, NOT MEANT TO BE READ BY ITSELF !! A.K.A. READ THE ONES BEFORE THIS.!)

entry.title: Losing Touch, Gaining His
entry.summary:
Author: averyhatake

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,837Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: A universe where Batman and Superman despite all their time of knowing each other and working together still have yet to reveal their identities. Finally the two first meet as civilians and the ball begins rolling. The two find themselves faltering both as hero's and as people, but will find themselves within one another again.

entry.title: You can take the boy from the circus
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 68,601Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 443

Summary: Damian Al-Ghul Wayne had everything at one point. He was a prince. Ibn al Xu'ffasch. Son of the bat. Heir to the demon. He had never asked to be ripped away from everything that he knew, from the warmth of his home, his culture, his palace in Nanda Parbat. He had never asked to be shipped to a gloomy, grey city. Even when his father kept taking in orphans and ruining his plans for inheritance, Damian stood steadfast. But then his father died, leaving behind his newest orphan. A tiny acrobat with watery blue eyes and black curls, who spoke no English. Damian knew the boy never asked to be ripped away from everything that he knew, from the warmth of his home, his culture, his circus troupe. Damian knew he needed to be there for him.

entry.title: second nature to love you
entry.summary:
Author: QuietLittleVoices

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,612Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 22

Summary: Clark was needed somewhere. Somewhere, out in the wide expanse of space, there was a planet in peril – it’s people crying out for Superman’s help. Clark knew that the details didn’t matter to Bruce, not on a personal level, though they mattered to the people a great deal. They mattered to Batman, but he wasn’t the person Clark was worried about right now. What mattered to all of them was that Clark would, once again, be leaving for an indeterminate amount of time to risk his life and that Bruce wouldn’t be there by his side, risking his own along with him.

entry.title: like grey skies (like a bird of paradise)
entry.summary:
Author: rainbow_nerds

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,934Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 300

Summary: He sighed to himself and downed the glass of champagne he'd been nursing—non-alcoholic, but enough to convince anyone who might give him a passing glance. He hated this, every time he had to do it. There was one surefire way to derail anyone who began wondering whether maybe Bruce Wayne was doing more than just donating funds to Batman.His tie hung loose around his neck, shirt unbuttoned to halfway down his chest, laughing too easily, pressing close to everyone he spoke to, whispering in ears, playing the part, until he turned and froze on the spot.Clark Kent, in his signature ill-fitting suit, stood holding a notebook and pen, staring at him with barely-concealed glee.Bruce cringed internally. He hated this. He especially hated when it had to be witnessed by someone he actually respected.or: After a Gala, Bruce and Clark end up in bed together. They're friends, just helping each other out, no strings attached. Which would be great, if Bruce hadn't been halfway to head-over-heels since the day they met.

entry.title: A New Dawn for Kal—El (Clark Wayne)
entry.summary:
Author: WriterDMathis

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,915Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Sequel to Luminous Fragments From The Veil Above. After the fall of his homeworld, Kal—El begins his new life on Earth, adopted by Bruce Wayne and his four sons. As he discovers Earth, its strange customs, and the warmth of a new family, he also finds love with Bruce—and a home he never thought he’d have. And his Earth name is known as Clark. Clark Wayne.

entry.title: And freedom of choice is granted

entry.title: Coming Alive
